message:
feat(mvcc): extend MVCC subsystem with GC, lifecycle, and 2PC improvements

Strengthen the multi-version concurrency control layer with additional
correctness infrastructure:

- begin_concurrent.rs: refine BEGIN CONCURRENT transaction semantics
  with improved conflict detection at commit time
- gc.rs (+58 lines): garbage collection for obsolete MVCC versions
  using epoch-based reclamation and watermark tracking
- lifecycle.rs (+98 lines): transaction state machine with proper
  savepoint nesting, rollback handling, and connection cleanup
- two_phase_commit.rs (+118 lines): extend 2PC coordinator with
  cross-database prepare/commit/abort protocol and WAL integration
- witness_objects.rs (+17 lines): expand SSI witness set tracking
  for serializable isolation anomaly detection
- xor_delta.rs (+10 lines): incremental delta encoding refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
